# orgAdminGrant

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for OrgAdminGrant records via csdk CLI

## Usage

```bash
csdk org-admin-grant list
csdk org-admin-grant get --id <value>
csdk org-admin-grant create --actorId <value> --entityId <value> [--isGrant <value>] [--grantorId <value>]
csdk org-admin-grant update --id <value> [--isGrant <value>] [--actorId <value>] [--entityId <value>] [--grantorId <value>]
csdk org-admin-grant delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all orgAdminGrant records

```bash
csdk org-admin-grant list
```

### Create a orgAdminGrant

```bash
csdk org-admin-grant create --actorId <value> --entityId <value> [--isGrant <value>] [--grantorId <value>]
```

### Get a orgAdminGrant by id

```bash
csdk org-admin-grant get --id <value>
```
